programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.desc: El deporte puede cambiar la vida de las personas, y muchas de sus enseñanzas pueden encontrarse en diferentes prácticas deportivas. Este programa narra historias relacionadas con distintas modalidades, así como entrevistas con estrellas de todo el mundo.

programme.title: Focus on Europe
programme.desc: Dive into the heart of the Indian subcontinent with Eco India. DW brings you stories focusing on environmental protection, sustainable practices, and technological solutions. programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: The Dip
programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons?
programme.desc: S3 E5 Was besser wirkt als Haft Actualmente hay unas 58 000 personas recluidas en las cárceles alemanas. Más de la mitad de ellas reinciden tras su puesta en libertad. Estas estadísticas plantean dudas sobre el sistema penitenciario. ¿Hay algún problema de fondo en las cárceles alemanas?

programme.title: Arts Unveiled: Experiencing and understanding the art world
programme.desc: "Arts Unveiled" se adentra en el panorama creativo internacional, descubriendo nuevas ideas y explicando los fenómenos culturales que dan forma a nuestra historia, nuestro presente y nuestro futuro.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa
programme.desc: In early September 1941, the German Wehrmacht was advancing on all fronts in the Soviet Union. Kyiv had fallen, the Smolensk stronghold had been defeated and Leningrad was under siege. Hitler intended to launch a major offensive against Moscow before the winter.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons?
programme.desc: S3 E5 Was besser wirkt als Haft Actualmente hay unas 58 000 personas recluidas en las cárceles alemanas. Más de la mitad de ellas reinciden tras su puesta en libertad. programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: La biblia sorprende
programme.desc: Entiende la Biblia sin los dogmas del clero. Las verdaderas enseñanzas de la Biblia de forma simple y amena. Teología sencilla para todos, con sentido del humor.

programme.title: Conexiones Bíblicas
programme.desc: Diferentes temas que tienen que ver con la Biblia y su comprensión y puesta en contexto, el alcance de su mensaje.

programme.title: Salvación en señales y símbolos
programme.desc: El pastor Carlos Muñoz, el doctor Héctor Delgado y su panel explican de forma sencilla el mensaje, los secretos y el lenguaje.

programme.title: Saúde e Você
programme.desc: Problemas que aquejan a la salud y cómo evitarlos manteniendo una vida sana y tomando medidas de prevención.

programme.title: Espaço Jovem
programme.desc: Conversaciones de jóvenes acerca de diferentes temas cristianos que tienen relación con su vida; su reflexión.

programme.title: Vida en Acción
programme.desc: Rutina de ejercicios fáciles, consejos para una dieta saludable, cómo poner en sus manos su salud a través de la actividad física y vivir bien.

programme.title: Hay Esperanza
programme.desc: Sermones que reflexionan sobre la palabra de Dios, lectura de textos que enseñan lecciones de vida y muestran un camino de luz.

programme.title: Anclas de la Verdad
programme.desc: Un programa con temas muy interesantes sobre las Sagradas Escrituras, llevando el mensaje de Dios.

programme.title: 3ABN Hoy Cocina
programme.desc: Recetas fáciles de hacer y saludables, las mejores versiones de platillos tradicionales.

programme.title: Estrellitas de Jesús
programme.desc: Programa infantil que imparte principios y valores para educar el carácter de los pequeños, se incluyen alabanzas, historias de la Biblia, juegos y aprendizaje de destrezas.

programme.title: Amiguitos de Jesús
programme.desc: Valores morales y espirituales que ayudará a los niños a cultivar un mejor carácter.

programme.title: Seguridad Nacional
programme.desc: La posición de la iglesia adventista sobre los temas de seguridad, los mitos, la verdadera amenaza, cómo protegerse.

programme.title: Camino, verdad y vida
programme.desc: Conferencias sobre diferentes temas cristianos, las dudas, los designios, la necesidad del encuentro con Dios.

programme.title: Libros del Libro
programme.desc: Sermones especiales basados en la Biblia, su estudio y sus enseñanzas, obras de reflexión sobre temas de trascendencia religiosa.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Comedian and stage actress Carol Burnett, who first gained popularity during her stint on "The Gary Moore Show," hosted this one-hour variety series. Her talented supporting players included Harvey Korman, Tim Conway, Vicki Lawrence (who got the job based on her resemblance to Burnett) and Lyle Waggoner. Skits often featured guest stars, such as Mama Cass of the Mamas and the Papas or singer Steve Lawrence. One sketch, "The Family" (which featured Lawrence as the persnickety Mama and Burnett as her hotheaded daughter) was later spun-off into it's own sitcom.

programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: Maranatha Mission Stories
programme.desc: Testimonies by people from various walks of life who have transformed their lives with help from Maranatha Mission volunteers.

programme.title: Revolutionary
programme.desc: "Rabbi" was Jesus' most commonly used title, but he embraced it in a very uncommon way; in Israel and New York, Oleg and Sergio explore a very different teacher who provided a totally different way for us to follow today.

programme.title: Lessons 4 Living
programme.desc: Lessons for navigating a spiritual journey.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: To teach His people the way of salvation, God instructed them to build a temple with three main areas: a courtyard, a holy place and a most holy place, illustrating what our High Priest, Jesus Christ, is doing today to eradicate sin from our lives.

programme.title: Unsealing Daniel's Mysteries
programme.desc: The host narrates stories from the Book of Daniel, explaining their significance and guiding people on the path of righteousness.

programme.title: Hope Sabbath School
programme.desc: A group of young adults participate in an in-depth and interactive study of the Bible while discussing a variety of topics.

programme.title: Hope at Night
programme.desc: Sharing life-changing stories from guests and challenging viewers with thought-provoking questions, calls to action and discussions about serious life topics.

programme.title: Cross Connection
programme.desc: Hosts Oleg and Sergio continue the discussion on Acts 10 and examine why the Gospel is about stepping outside the comfort zone and learning to accept all people without prejudice.

programme.title: Unhooked
programme.desc: People recovering from addictions and unhealthy habits share their respective stories and journeys of growth from experiences.

programme.title: New Perceptions
programme.desc: Messages from Pioneer Memorial Church.

programme.title: Revelation of Hope Seminar - Taj Pacleb
programme.desc: Pastor Taj Pacleb delivers a sermon and encourages people to follow the right path and live in accordance with God's will.

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots
programme.desc: (1971) Vanessa Redgrave stars in a dramatisation of the life of the 16th-century Scottish queen. Glenda Jackson co-stars as her cousin and rival, England's Queen Elizabeth I.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Oblivion Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise talks about making the sci-fi-adventure Oblivion.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: Jackass Forever
programme.desc: (2022) Outrageous adult comedy with Johnny Knoxville, Wee Man and friends. The Jackasses reunite for more painfully real stunts. Older? Yes. Wiser? You decide.

programme.title: Buffalo Soldiers
programme.desc: (2001) Joaquin Phoenix plays a US GI based in Cold War Germany who makes a living from the black market. Then his sergeant (Scott Glenn) takes an interest... Strong language/violence/drugs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: (1957) Classic sci-fi horror about the perils of radiation. A normal-sized fella gets a lot, lot smaller when he breathes in a mysterious mist. Definitely not one for arachnophobes!

programme.title: The Man from Colorado
programme.desc: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

programme.title: All the King's Men
programme.desc: (1949) Drama with John Ireland. A local politician begins to lust for the kind of power he used to hold to account. He should be careful how he treats people on the way to the top...

programme.title: Quentin Tarantino on Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: The director talks about his Second World War-based film, starring Brad Pitt.

programme.title: Gunman's Walk
programme.desc: (1958) Western. Van Heflin stars as a veteran frontiersman whose determination to mould his sons in his gun-totin' image backfires disastrously. With Tab Hunter and James Darren.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy starring Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Escape from Pretoria
programme.desc: (2020) Daniel Radcliffe stars as an imprisoned ANC activist planning a jailbreak in apartheid-era South Africa, in Frank Annan's taut fact-based thriller. Adapted from Tim Jenkin's memoir.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: (2019) Sci-fi action sequel with Linda Hamilton and Arnold Schwarzenegger. A factory worker is targeted by deadly robot assassins from the future. Thank goodness he's back.

programme.title: Lola
programme.desc: (2022) Lo-fi sci-fi. In 1940, two sisters invent a contraption that intercepts future broadcasts. But it inadvertently creates an alternate timeline in which the Nazis win the war. Oops.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: (1959) Western starring Henry Fonda. A gunfighter is hired to protect a town from a raiding gang. But a vendetta could undermine him. With Anthony Quinn, Richard Widmark and Dorothy Malone.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Halls of Montezuma
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War drama. Richard Widmark stars as a commanding officer leading US Marines into the Pacific to capture Japanese prisoners and discover the location of a rocket base.

programme.title: Tobruk
programme.desc: (1967) World War II thriller. George Peppard, Rock Hudson and Nigel Green lead a daring Allied raid to destroy Nazi fuel dumps in North Africa.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: (2009) Quentin Tarantino's World War II action-adventure. Jewish American soldiers go Nazi-hunting in occupied France. With Brad Pitt, Diane Kruger, Christoph Waltz and Michael Fassbender.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: (2022) Jalmari Helander's ultra-violent, Nazi-slaying survival adventure starring Jorma Tommila. A bunch of Nazis try to steal a grizzled Finnish ex-soldier's gold. But he ain't having it.

programme.title: Crawlspace
programme.desc: (2022) Tense thriller with Henry Thomas. A plumber gets trapped in the crawlspace of a house with a stash of cash that two bad guys want back. And they'll shoot blindly at walls to get it.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sailor of the King
programme.desc: (1953) Drama starring Jeffrey Hunter as a Canadian serving in the WWII Royal Navy who is captured by the German raider that sunk his ship but escapes and seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Desert Fox
programme.desc: (1951) Drama. James Mason stars in Henry Hathaway's sympathetic portrait of Field Marshal Erwin Rommel in the final years of his life during the Second World War. With Jessica Tandy.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: (2019) Fun-filled family comedy starring John Cena. A macho fireman has to babysit three impish kids after saving them from a blaze in the remote California woodlands.

programme.title: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: (2004) Drama. Dennis Quaid stars as the captain of an aircraft downed in the desert. There's no hope of rescue, unless he and the survivors can build another plane from the wreckage.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: (2022) Going-for-gold action. Tom Holland and Mark Wahlberg compare abs as they scour the globe for an olde explorer's lost gold. The heat is on. The time is right. Only the best survive.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost...
programme.desc: ...Protocol: (2011) Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy!

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.

programme.title: Oblivion Interview Special
programme.desc: Tom Cruise talks about making the sci-fi-adventure Oblivion.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: (2018) Dark sci-fi action starring Tom Hardy as Marvel's anti-hero. A reporter becomes inhabited by a ferocious alien that has its own ideas on how to behave. With Michelle Williams.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: River of No Return
programme.desc: (1954) Western with Robert Mitchum and Marilyn Monroe. An ex-con and a saloon singer steer a raft through hostile territory to face a showdown with her crooked fiancé. With Rory Calhoun.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: (2016) Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: (1957) David Lean's Oscar-winning fact-based Second World War classic stars Alec Guinness as the driven commander of a group of POWs building a rail bridge for the Japanese.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: (2022) Danger-zone action as Tom Cruise returns to the cockpit after 36 years. He's Maverick. He still feels the need for speed. And there's a near-impossible mission to fly. With Jon Hamm.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: (2007) Western starring Christian Bale and Russell Crowe. An impoverished rancher tries to earn some money and his family's respect by escorting a dangerous outlaw on his way to jail.

programme.title: Monos
programme.desc: (2019) Alejandro Landes's hallucinatory war film. A ragtag band of teenage soldiers, who live on a mountaintop in Latin America, guard an American hostage with their lives. In Spanish/subs.

programme.title: The Last Challenge
programme.desc: An upstart outlaw (Chad Everett) baits a legendary gunslinger (Glenn Ford), now a marshal in love with a saloonkeeper (Angie Dickinson).

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: A reformed Texas outlaw (Gary Cooper), a con man and a singer (Julie London) meet the outlaw's old gang.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: One-eyed Marshal Cogburn helps a Bible-toting spinster find the men who killed her preacher father.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon) are primed to hit the beach for some fun in the sun. The only thing standing in the way of their good times is curmudgeonly developer Harvey Huntington Honeywagon (Keenan Wynn), who is intent on turning their teenage hotspot into a grazing ground for seniors. If that weren't bad enough, British rock 'n' roll singer Potato Bug (also Avalon) shows up to spark a summer romance with Frankie's main squeeze -- Dee Dee.

programme.title: The Last Challenge
programme.desc: Hotshot gunfighter Lot McGuire intends to make a name for himself by out-duelling legendary bandit-turned-lawman Marshal Dan Blaine. Before any bullets fly, however, Lot and his intended enemy strike up an unlikely friendship, and Blaine tries to convince the youngster to call off the shootout. Unfortunately, Lot can't be talked out of his quest for glory, and so he guns down a few hostile locals, leaving Blaine no choice but to finally accept the offer for a showdown.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A former Confederate spy asks Earp and Bat to help her escape from her dead brother's gang; Bat develops feelings for the woman, but Earp, doubting her story, obeys a warrant calling for her arrest.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp agrees to escort a stage carrying money for Wells Fargo while Bat, Tom Russell and a posse set a trap for the gang planning to attack it.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes takes a holiday in Cornwall's countryside, only to have his healthy routine interrupted by something that happened during the night.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Ted Daniels (Cameron Mitchell) is a traveling rodeo hand who is attached to very little besides Gallant Bess, the wild horse that he has trained with patience and dedication. When Ted meets Penny (Audrey Long), the beautiful daughter of Doc Gray (Harry Cheshire), he falls in love with her, but circumstances force him to choose between loyalty to his steed and the chance of having a life with Penny. Can he find a way to win back Gallant Bess and get the girl?

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat resigns as sheriff and enters into a partnership with local saloon owner Luke Short, who must fight a takeover attempt by two corrupt businessmen; Earp and Bat request a restraining order to stop the men but face resistance from Mayor Kelley.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon) are primed to hit the beach for some fun in the sun. The only thing standing in the way of their good times is curmudgeonly developer Harvey Huntington Honeywagon (Keenan Wynn), who is intent on turning their teenage hotspot into a grazing ground for seniors. If that weren't bad enough, British rock 'n' roll singer Potato Bug (also Avalon) shows up to spark a summer romance with Frankie's main squeeze -- Dee Dee.

programme.title: Hands Across the Rockies
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok and his sidekick Cannonball meet a woman who is scheduled to marry the murderer they are trailing.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Based on Truman Capote's novel, this is the story of a young woman in New York City who meets a young man when he moves into her apartment building. He is with an older woman who is very wealthy, but he wants to be a writer. She is working as an expensive escort and searching for a rich, older man to marry.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: In this moving 1953 drama from director Melvin Frank, Col. Paul Tibbets, commander of the 509th Composite Group during World War II, struggles to come to grips with his peculiar place in human history: He's the first man to ever drop an atomic bomb. While his wife, Lucy, has stayed loyal to him, the aftermath of causing such destruction leaves Paul questioning his humanity and the mission that may have forever diminished it.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Tex McKay, a reckless railroad driver, spins tales about his experience and starts fights; when Tex deflects blame for a crash he caused, Earp searches for the truth while Tex's friends go after an innocent man.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates when a prize race horse disappears and its trainer dies unnaturally.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Buckskin Lady
programme.desc: Gambler Angela Medley (Patricia Medina) is courted by local gunman Slinger (Gerald Mohr), but she has feelings for Dr. Bruce Merritt (Richard Denning). After her father hustles Merritt out of some money, Angela promises to repay him quickly. But she loses a card game against Slinger and gets herself further into trouble. Soon, Merritt thinks she is involved with the gunman. Distraught, Angela leaves town with Slinger, but the two men continue to fight over her, with serious consequences.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp investigates a stagecoach robbery involving $5,000 in silver dollars and becomes confounded when the driver's account of the incident proves false, and Hal subsequently finds the driver shot to death.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Based on Truman Capote's novel, this is the story of a young woman in New York City who meets a young man when he moves into her apartment building. He is with an older woman who is very wealthy, but he wants to be a writer. She is working as an expensive escort and searching for a rich, older man to marry.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: In this moving 1953 drama from director Melvin Frank, Col. Paul Tibbets, commander of the 509th Composite Group during World War II, struggles to come to grips with his peculiar place in human history: He's the first man to ever drop an atomic bomb. While his wife, Lucy, has stayed loyal to him, the aftermath of causing such destruction leaves Paul questioning his humanity and the mission that may have forever diminished it.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: The Zachary family live quietly on a cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas. A stranger (Joseph Wiseman) appears and disturbs their bucolic existence by spreading a malicious rumor that their adopted daughter, Rachel (Audrey Hepburn), is a Kiowa Native American. Soon, the Zachary brothers (Audie Murphy, Burt Lancaster) and their mother (Lillian Gish) must defend themselves from both racist whites and vengeful Kiowa.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: A Chicago police detective (John Wayne) hunts a mobster in London with a policewoman escort (Judy Geeson) from Scotland Yard.

programme.title: The Courtship of Eddie's Father
programme.desc: A young boy uses a peculiar and humorous standard to determine the perfect wife for his widowed father.

programme.title: Les Misérables
programme.desc: After Victor Hugo's Jean Valjean (Richard Jordan) steals a loaf of bread, Inspector Javert (Anthony Perkins) hounds him for the rest of his life.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A murder investigation leads Holmes and Watson on a wild goose chase.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) try to help an unhappy bride.

programme.title: Brannigan
programme.desc: A Chicago police detective (John Wayne) hunts a mobster in London with a policewoman escort (Judy Geeson) from Scotland Yard.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Whispering Smith
programme.desc: A railroad detective (Alan Ladd) learns his ex-sweetheart's husband (Robert Preston) has joined a train robber's (Donald Crisp) gang.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: A Texas woman (Lillian Gish) and her eldest son (Burt Lancaster) fight Kiowas over an adopted daughter (Audrey Hepburn).

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: One-eyed Marshal Cogburn helps a Bible-toting spinster find the men who killed her preacher father.

programme.title: Scalplock
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Dale Robertson) wins a railroad in a card game and has to keep it going as people try to take it away from him.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Action in the North Atlantic
programme.desc: Merchant Marine sailors Joe Rossi (Humphrey Bogart) and Steve Jarvis (Raymond Massey) are charged with getting a supply vessel to Russian allies as part of a sea convoy. When the group of ships comes under attack from a German U-boat, Rossi and Jarvis navigate through dangerous waters to evade Nazi naval forces. Though their mission across the Atlantic is extremely treacherous, they are motivated by the opportunity to strike back at the Germans, who sank one of their earlier ships.

programme.title: To Be or Not to Be
programme.desc: Acting couple Joseph (Jack Benny) and Maria Tura (Carole Lombard) are managing a theatrical troupe when the Nazis invade Poland. Maria is having an affair with Lieutenant Sobinski (Robert Stack), who suspects Professor Siletsky (Stanley Ridges) is a Nazi spy. With Siletsky in possession of a list of members of the Polish resistance, the Turas' company takes action. Using their skill for impersonation, Joseph and company must confuse the Nazis and stop Siletsky from handing over the list.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a death and the disappearance of plans for a secret submarine.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: King of the Bandits
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid and Pancho track an outlaw responsible for a series of stagecoach robberies and masquerading as the Kid.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: The Catholic Mass
programme.desc: The Heart of the nation Sunday mass brings the beauty and traditions of the Catholic faith.

programme.title: Perry Stone
programme.desc: Religious teachings from Perry Stone.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Cy Johnson, a cattle driver with a grudge, frames Earp for a $10,000 robbery, but Doc Holliday catches wind of Cy's scheme and helps Earp clear his name and bring the true culprits to justice.

programme.title: Raw Edge
programme.desc: In 1842 lawless Oregon, a gunfighter seeks vengeance when his innocent brother is lynched and his beautiful Indian wife is claimed by the local tyrant.

programme.title: Scalplock
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Dale Robertson) wins a railroad in a card game and has to keep it going as people try to take it away from him.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: Sequel to the Oscar-winning "True Grit" finds the trigger-happy Rooster trying to win back his law badge by hunting a gang of bandits and a stolen shipment of explosives. His job is not made any easier by the daughter of one of the gang's victims, who insists on coming along for the ride.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Ex-outlaw Link Jones (Gary Cooper) is aboard a train when it is robbed by bandits. When he tries to intervene, he's knocked out and left in the middle of nowhere with saloon singer Billie (Julie London), whom he hoped to hire as a schoolteacher in his town, and Sam (Arthur O'Connell), a con man. Link brings the three to his nearby former home, now the hideout for the bandits, who are led by his uncle (Lee J. Cobb) -- and to save his new friends, he must rejoin the old gang for one last holdup.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailing to Baghdad after a narrow escape from the monster island of Colossa, the wedding plans of legendary hero Sinbad and Princess Parisa are spoiled by the scheming sorcerer Sokurah. In return for his previous help with the cyclops on Colossa, Sokurah demands that Sinbad retrieve a lamp he lost on the island. When Sinbad refuses, the conjurer shrinks Parisa, forcing the sailor and his crew back to the high seas in order to save her.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: After saving the life of his royal father's usurper, Pelias (Douglas Wilmer), whom he fails to recognize, Jason (Todd Armstrong) is encouraged by the conniving murderer to begin a quest in search of the Golden Fleece. In doing so, Pelias hopes for Jason's death to thwart the prophecy that he will reclaim the throne. Along the journey, Jason is protected by the goddess Hera (Honor Blackman), and his crew includes Hercules (Nigel Green) and Acastus (Gary Raymond), a saboteur planted by Pelias.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: Dolores (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon), attractive young surfers in Southern California, are just out for a good time. Their relaxed lifestyle fascinates Professor Sutwell (Bob Cummings), an anthropologist who decides to study the social lives of teens. A series of beach-themed films would follow the blueprint set by this one, which hinges on romantic rivalries, rugged motorcyclists, an attempted crime and plenty of handsome people.

programme.title: Law of the Canyon
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) and his sidekick (Smiley Burnette) bust a frontier protection racket.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A curse may be the cause of Sir Charles' death.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: All that stands between Ally from Fort William, Sylvia from Darlington, Jan from Gloucester, Ro from Salford and thousands of pounds is the small matter of one of the Chasers.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.desc: Canada face Switzerland at the 2026 FIFA World Cup live from Vancouver with Mark Pougatch, Ian Wright, Patrick Vieira and Duncan Ferguson.

programme.title: ITV News London

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: If it's an animal roaming the wild, Jim Shockey has probably hunted it. The veteran wilderness guide and outfitter has tracked game in more than 40 countries and taken in excess of 300 species using bow, muzzleloader and rifle. In addition, Shockey has exclusive guiding territories on Vancouver Island, in the Yukon Territory, in Mexico's Sonoran Desert, and in his native Saskatchewan, all of which helps supply content for the hunting adventures seen in this award-winning series. Jim's daughter Eva, a full-fledged hunter in her own right, joins her dad on many episodes.

programme.desc: S02 E05 Joe Walker: Humble Hero Joe Walker doesn't head west to seek fame and fortune, but his trailblazing explorations across the uncharted frontier usher in a golden age of expansion and settlement that help create the United States as we know them today.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E06 The Littlest Cowboy After a gang beats him, Ike becomes depressed about his handicap until a terminally ill boy teaches him a valuable lesson about life.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E05 The Cats of Paradise Maverick becomes involved with a woman who sells cats to mining camps.

programme.title: Reprieve
programme.desc: Sheriff Pinkerton deputizes Cheyenne, and he transports crook Wes McQueen to a hidden fortune; when someone shoots and kills McQueen, Cheyenne impersonates him in order to find the bounty.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E07 Day of Reckoning Bigoted Ike Daggett takes action when Ben gives an Indian and his wife land after the Indian saves his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E14 The Gaucho An Argentine family moves to North Fork and settles on a ranch adjoining Lucas'.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E15 The Pet Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax when they adopt a horse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E16 The Sheridan Story A broken confederate soldier confronts Gen. Phil Sheridan at the McCain ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E17 The Retired Gun Outlaws hunt a retired gunfighter who has settled in North Fork.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S02 E09 Every Cowboy for Themselves The four remaining cowboys race to rope and load two steers without help, then they each ride a green horse through a challenging obstacle course.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: S02 E10 Last Hand Standing Only three cowboys remain, after outriding, outperforming and outfoxing some of the best cowboys in the nation; at sundown, host Trace Adkins and his expert judges determine which one of them will win a $50,000 herd and a lifetime of bragging rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E30 The Mescalero Curse Lucas is cursed by a renegade Indian with a reputation for witchcraft.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S03 E31 Stopover The North Fork stagecoach must stop at the McCain ranch because of a severe snowstorm.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E12 The Quick and the Dead Bret becomes wanted for a robbery committed by three other men.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E06 Sister Blandina and the Killer While serving as a missionary in the West, Sister Blandina bravely thwarts an angry mob intent on hanging a man accused of attempted murder.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E01 Bat Masterson to the Rescue Former lawman Bat Masterson finds himself powerless to help an old friend whose brother has been falsely imprisoned; an overreaching sheriff is intent on seeing the brother hang, so Bat hatches a plan to bust him out of jail.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E07 Jim Clyman: Frontier Survivor When he is separated from his trapping party, frontiersman Jim Clyman is 600 miles from the nearest fort; to survive the grueling trek, he must put his fate in the hands of Native Americans, without knowing if they will help him or kill him on sight.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E07 Blood Money When a prisoner (Billy Joe Patton) mysteriously dies, the riders go undercover to expose a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S03 E06 A Tale of Three Cities Bart can't seem to avoid a young lady whose father is in debt.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S04 E03 The Rebellion Cheyenne springs a trap to catch the would-be assassins of Juarez and snags a killer.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Abduction Hoss and Little Joe spend the most unforgettable night at the carnival when Little Joe's date disappears.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E18 The Photographer Lucas' old friend, a traveling photographer, is accused of murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E19 Shivaree A young couple traveling in a wagon train causes trouble for all of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E20 The Dead-Eye Kid A smart-aleck boy from Brooklyn comes west to seek his fortune.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E10 A Shard of Glass Haunted by the memory of leaving a man to die, mountain man Jim Bridger is determined not to repeat the mistake; when his trapping party runs out of water while crossing a barren desert, Bridger struggles desperately to keep his companions alive.

programme.desc: S03 E32 The Lonesome Bride Two cowhands submit Lucas' name to a matchmaker.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E11 Al Jennings and the Legend of Dick West Tired of his boring life, attorney Al Jennings chooses a life of danger when he takes part in notorious outlaw Dick West's last crime spree.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E09 The Trials of Temple Houston Temple Houston, flamboyant son of Sam Houston, works hard to live up to his famous name as a top attorney in the Oklahoma Territory; when his flair for showmanship annoys his courtroom rivals the Jennings brothers, the feud erupts into bloodshed.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E03 Andrew Henry: Man of His Word Though Andrew Henry has little experience when he partners in a trapping expedition, he pledges his word to complete the risky venture; as Blackfeet warriors close in, he must weigh his personal integrity against the lives of the men he leads.

programme.title: The Young Riders
